heading: Reimbursement of appropriation for salaries and compensation of employees in mechanical shops
label: 2240 Reimbursement of appropriation for salaries and compensation of employees in mechanical shops
text: The Secretary of Agriculture may, by transfer settlements through the Government Accountability Office, reimburse any appropriation made for the salaries and compensation of employees in the mechanical shops of the department from the appropriation made for the bureau, office, or division for which any work in said shops is performed, and such reimbursement shall be at the actual cost of labor for such work.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to the general revision and enactment of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, by , , .section 543 of Title 5Pub. L. 89–554, § 180 Stat. 378Sept. 6, 1966
Amendments2004— substituted “Government Accountability Office” for “General Accounting Office”.Pub. L. 108–271
